title: Amazon 发布 AWS Agent Marketplace
fact: This isn’t just a new product. It’s a signal that the agentic AI era is no longer theoretical, it’s happening now.

title: OpenAI 完成 5000 万美元 A 轮融资
fact: SAN FRANCISCO , June 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Poetic (formerly known as Forge), the company building a new class of software that learns like AI but runs like code, announced that it has raised a $50M Series A at a $500M valuation led by Kleiner Perkins. Founders Fund, First Harmonic and OpenAI also participated in the round.

title: Notch 完成 3000 万美元 A 轮融资
fact: We Raised $30 Million to Build the AI Operating System for Regulated Industries

title: Cursor 推出 Auto-review 机制：用分类器智能体动态管控智能体自主权限
fact: However, greater autonomy introduces security risks if agents take unintended actions. This is especially true for local agents, which often run near files, credentials, environment variables, MCP tools, and have access to production systems.

title: Cursor 推出 Auto-review 实现智能体自治管控
fact: However, greater autonomy introduces security risks if agents take unintended actions. This is especially true for local agents, which often run near files, credentials, environment variables, MCP tools, and have access to production systems.

title: Cohere 发布 North Mini Code：30B 参数 MoE 编码模型，3B 活跃参数，单卡 H100 运行，支持 256K 上下文
fact: This week, Cohere AI team shipped its first developer-facing coding model named ‘ North Mini Code ‘. ‘North Mini Code’ is open-weight and focused at software engineers. It is a mixture-of-experts (MoE) model with 30B total parameters. Only 3B of those parameters activate per token.

title: xAI 发布 Grok Build 插件市场，首发集成 MongoDB、Vercel、Sentry、Chrome DevTools、Cloudflare 等插件
fact: Grok Build is xAI’s coding agent and CLI for software engineering work. The marketplace adds a discovery and distribution layer on top. Before this, developers wired up each integration one at a time. Now a single command pulls a complete bundle into the agent. The catalog lives in the open repo xai-org/plugin-marketplace on GitHub. That repo is an index. It points at plugin sources so Grok Build can fetch them.

title: DoorDash 推出 AI 聊天机器人，帮助处理订单、预订和杂货清单
fact: DoorDash Inc. introduced an in-app artificial intelligence chatbot to help customers make restaurant and grocery orders, and suggested the technology could also be used to unlock new enterprise revenue streams.

title: 阿里云发布 Meoo CLI：本地 AI 编程项目可一键部署上线

title: 京东发布国内首个智能体自主支付协议A2P2，划分L0至L5六个等级

title: Claude Code v2.1.174 发布
fact: Added wheelScrollAccelerationEnabled setting to disable mouse-wheel scroll acceleration in fullscreen mode

title: 微软发布 Chrome / Edge 浏览器扩展，一键关闭 Bing 搜索结果 AI 回答内容
fact: IT之家 6 月 12 日消息，微软搜索部门负责人乔迪 · 里巴斯（Jordi Ribas）于 6 月 6 日在 X 平台发布推文，展示了一款浏览器扩展程序，支持在 Bing 搜索结果中， 让用户一键关闭 Copilot 生成的 AI 回答内容。

title: OpenAI 收购云平台 Ona 以支持 AI 智能体
fact: OpenAI has agreed to acquire Ona, a startup that offers cloud services to support artificial intelligence agents, part of a bid by the AI developer to make its technology more useful for businesses.

title: 贝佐斯 AI 初创公司 Prometheus 获融资，估值 410 亿美元
fact: Prometheus, an artificial intelligence startup led by Jeff Bezos , has raised a round of funding that values it at $41 billion, bolstering the Amazon.com Inc. founder’s status as a significant player in the AI boom.
